archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury (Adapted for Medical AI)
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine clinical precision with high-end tech aesthetic.
Emotion First: The UI should evoke trust, advanced capability, and calm.
Contrast & Hierarchy: Pure black/navy backgrounds with glowing electric cyan accents.

surface_strategies.headers_and_nav: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-2xl and border-b border-white/10.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background (#0F172A) with 1px border-white/10, no shadow. On hover, slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
surface_strategies.active_upload_zone: Tracing Beam style: dashed border that glows primary_accent when active or dragged over.

layout_and_spacing.general: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6 or p-8 for card internals. Avoid cramped data views.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Every pixel utilized intentionally.
layout_and_spacing.landing_hero: Asymmetrical split. Text max-w-2xl on left, abstract visual on right or as a rich background with bg-black/40 overlay. Max overlay opacity bg-black/50.

components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-medium. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5.
components.progress_bars: Use Shadcn Progress, customize indicator to glowing primary_accent or danger_alert depending on TB probability.
components.modals_dialogs: Shadcn Dialog with Glassmorphism overlay (backdrop-blur-md bg-black/80) and sleek dark surface.
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with Duotone weight for a premium technical look.
components.charts: Shadcn Charts / Recharts. Dark theme grids (stroke-white/5), data lines in primary_accent.

pages_instructions.landing: Immersive hero section using 'hero_background'. Title text left-aligned, prominent CTA. Use Framer Motion for fade-up entrance.
pages_instructions.dashboard: Sidebar nav (glassmorphism). Top row: 3 stats cards (Total Scans, TB Detected, Normal). Middle: Recent scans list or chart.
pages_instructions.analysis: Main feature. Center stage drag-and-drop zone. Once uploaded, show side-by-side: Original X-Ray and Grad-CAM Heatmap. Below: Probability score with glowing progress bar and 'Generate PDF' button.
pages_instructions.pdf_report: CRITICAL: The generated PDF must use a light theme layout for printing clarity. White background, black text, clear X-ray images.
pages_instructions.about: Bento grid layout explaining CNN and Grad-CAM. Use 'analysis_background' for one of the bento cells.

motion.page_transitions: Fade in with subtle 10px slide up (Framer Motion).
motion.loading_states: Cyan glowing pulse or abstract skeleton loader.
motion.hover_effects: Buttons scale up slightly (1.02), cards lift and border brightens.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark medical tech background for landing page hero.

analysis_background.description: High-tech AI scanning concept background for the About page or Analysis empty state.

chest_xray_placeholder_1.description: Realistic chest X-ray image for testing the analysis upload UI.

chest_xray_placeholder_2.description: Doctor reviewing X-ray, good for About or Landing page features.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-zone').
